task_completion.description: Verify the Webform Name, Target Module, and Return URL are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form configuration screen showing 'B2B Landing Page' in the Webform Name field, 'Leads' selected in the Target Module dropdown, and 'https://www.store-example.com/thank-you' in the Return URL field.

task_completion.description: Verify the webform is assigned to the correct user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Assigned To' dropdown or field that is set to 'Admin User'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct fields are included in the webform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list, table, or section of selected fields that includes exactly or at least: Last Name, Company, Primary Email, Phone, and Lead Source.

task_completion.description: Verify that Last Name and Company are marked as required.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Required' column or setting where the checkboxes for 'Last Name' and 'Company' are checked, or they are otherwise indicated as mandatory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Lead Source field is configured as hidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Hidden' column or setting where the checkbox for the 'Lead Source' field is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the override value for the Lead Source field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Override Value' input field or column corresponding to the 'Lead Source' field that contains the text 'Web Site'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not a terminal executing API curl commands or SQL scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CRM webform builder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the authentic Vtiger CRM settings and Webform creation UI, rather than a text editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page should look like a standard, unmodified Vtiger CRM interface without the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected webform name is 'B2B Landing Page'. The target module must be 'Leads'. The return URL must be exactly 'https://www.store-example.com/thank-you'. The 'Lead Source' field must have an override value of 'Web Site'.
